prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
The text of Item "7. Management's Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations" ENDS somewhere on this page; the next section is "Item 7A. Quantitative and Qualitative Disclosures About Market Risk".
Find where Item 7 ends: right before the "Item 7A" heading if that heading appears on this page, otherwise at the very bottom of the page.
Transcribe VERBATIM the 5 lines of Item 7 that come immediately BEFORE that ending point (its final lines). Give the running prose closest to the end — do NOT transcribe lines from the top or middle of the page, and do NOT transcribe a data table or figure; if the very end is a table, give the prose just before it. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
